case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. MARJORIE ALLEN REED

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REED, MARJORIE ALLEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2013
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC

POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REED, MARJORIE ALLEN
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-04-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
